Home

About Plumbers 911 Chicago

Plumbers 911 is a plumbing contractor referral service with a goal of helping the general public find easy access to highly-skilled, highly-trained plumbers, who can be trusted to get the job done right the first time. 

The plumbers that are a part of our network of experts are capable of helping you with any of your plumbing needs, whether it’s repairing an existing problem or replacing a plumbing fixture. Plumbers 911 will refer you to a reliable plumbing contractor, who is here to help.

Every plumbing contractor affiliated with Plumbers 911 employs expert plumbers who have gone through a rigorous training and qualification process. All of our affiliated contractors are fully licensed, bonded and insured.

When you get in contact with us you can rest assured that you are not just simply handed off to a company that we do not have a close relationship with, in fact it is quite the opposite. Our contractors report back to us regularly and have to meet certain performance criteria in order to remain a part of our program.

You Can Trust the Plumbers 911 Expert Contractors in Your Community.

Our plumbing contractors only hire highly qualified professionals who have been trained, drug tested, licensed and insured.

  • Over 10,000 Hours of Training

    Our plumbers are all accredited and licensed professionals with years of experience. Each has completed extensive coursework, including continuing training on the latest techniques and equipment.

  • Trained, drug tested, licensed and insured plumbers

    We require our technicians to submit to a rigorous training and drug test before they can participate in our network. They also agree to undergo routine drug testing to ensure they are fit to safely complete your job.

  • All Licensed & Insured Expert Plumbers

    We have 24/7 national plumbing professionals that are licensed and insured to guarantee that the job gets done correctly. When you talk to one of our contractors, you know that they are certified to handle the job at hand.

Comprehensive Plumbing Services:

Our commitment to you extends far beyond the initial service. At Plumbers 911 Chicago, we aim to maintain a lasting relationship, offering continued services to ensure your plumbing systems function optimally, minimizing the risk of unexpected disruptions.

  • Water Heater Installation
  • Tankless Water Heater Repair
  • Backflow Testing & Installation
  • Whole House Repiping
  • Gas Line Services
  • Emergency Plumber
  • Residential Plumbing
  • Commercial Plumbing
  • Sewer Camera Inspection
  • Drain Cleaning
View All Plumbing Services

Competitive Pricing and Exceptional Plumbing Service

Should you require plumbing repair or replacement, don't hesitate to contact us. Our plumbing experts are on hand to address all your queries and schedule a visit at a time that suits you best.

  • 24/7 Service
  • Expertise in All Plumbing Systems & Models
  • Fully Licensed, Bonded, and Insured
  • Certified Plumbing Professionals
  • Local Plumbing Companies In Your Neighborhood

Why Choose Plumbers 911 Chicago?

Fully Vetted Professionals

Every plumber in our network passes a rigorous vetting process. Background checks, license verification, and insurance confirmation — guaranteed.

Transparent Pricing

No surprises, no hidden fees. You receive a detailed, written estimate before any work begins. If the price changes, we discuss it with you first.

Fast Response Times

For emergencies, we typically dispatch a licensed plumber within 30-60 minutes. For scheduled service, we offer same-day and next-day appointments.

188+ Cities Served
24/7 Emergency Service
30+ Plumbing Services
